name: Enforce Node Integrity SRP Across All Radiants
desc: Audit every agent (Radiant) to confirm zero overlapping scopes. Each must be an atomic, specialized unit per Sacred Geometry SRP mandates.

name: Implement MCP Sampling Resonance Routing
desc: Wire sampling/createMessage so sub-agents consult the Nucleus before performing any Destructive or External (internet-facing) operations.

name: Deploy hc_master_orchestrator.ps1 Entry Point
desc: Retire hcautobuild.ps1, hc_autobuild.ps1, hcautobuild_enhanced.ps1, and hcautobuild_optimizer.ps1. Implement single entry: hc_master_orchestrator.ps1 -Mode [Dev|Prod|Optimize] -Target [Build|Deploy|Audit].

name: Isolate Runtime Directories
desc: Enforce strict directory isolation: /core/node-api/ (Manager, Registry), /core/python-logic/ (Data, Vectorized LTM), /core/scripts/ (PowerShell automation).

name: Segment heady-manager.js into Micro-Services
desc: Decompose heady-manager.js (90KB) into /services/registry/, /services/mcp-server/, and /services/event-bus/ per Master Orchestration Protocol.

name: Convert site-generator.js to Headless Radiant Engine
desc: Transition site-generator.js (91KB) to consume templates via MCP Resources (system://templates/v2) instead of hardcoded string interpolation.

name: Deploy Redis STM Active Intent Keys
desc: Implement Redis-based Short-Term Memory with Active Intent keys to manage locks and prevent agent collision during parallel builds.

name: Initialize Vectorized LTM Context Store
desc: Implement ChromaDB or pgvectorscale-based Long-Term Memory so Buddy retrieves relevant snippets from 7+ READMEs without overloading LLM context windows.

name: Establish Firestore Artifact Hierarchy
desc: Structure Firestore as: /artifacts/{appId}/public/data/ (global config/metadata) and /artifacts/{appId}/users/{userId}/ (agent logs, user preferences).

name: Execute git-filter-repo Secret Purge
desc: Remove .env.hybrid, legacy credentials (heady:heady_secret), server.pid, and audit_logs.jsonl from all repository history using git-filter-repo.

name: Deploy Sentinel Agent Anomaly Detection Loop
desc: Launch a dedicated Sentinel Agent to scan audit_logs.jsonl every 6 hours using Anomaly Detection prompts, identifying unauthorized tool usage or prompt injection.

name: Implement JIT MCP SOP Context Loading
desc: Replace full documentation loading with MCP Prompts that pull specific Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) based on current task metadata.

name: Enforce pnpm-lock.yaml Deterministic Builds
desc: Delete package-lock.json and yarn.lock across all sub-directories. Force pnpm-lock.yaml as the sole lockfile to ensure parity.

name: Implement Radiant JSON Heartbeat Protocol
desc: All Radiants must emit JSON heartbeats to mcp://system/health. If a heartbeat is missed, the Nucleus triggers auto-restart via the Master Orchestrator.

name: Wrap PowerShell Build Logic into MCP Tools
desc: Expose all PowerShell build automation as documented MCP tools callable by HeadyBuddy and the agent swarm.

name: Consolidate READMEs into VitePress Docs Site
desc: Merge all README_* files into a single, searchable VitePress site hosted in /docs for Docs-as-Code compliance.

name: Zero-Trust Credential Audit Across Sub-Repos
desc: Confirm no credentials exist in plaintext across any HeadyMe sub-repo. Enforce encrypted injection via CI/CD environment variables only.
